content.text:
<timestamp>Friday, May 15, 2026, 1:58 PM (UTC+8)</timestamp>
<user_query>
I need you to extract copywriting insights from a competitor research Excel file and organize them for merging into an existing Cursor Skill's reference files.

## Source Data

Read the file `c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\IWE\竞品listing_full.md` which contains the full export of a competitor analysis Excel file. It has these sheets:
- 音质&外观卖点listing调研 (140 rows) — audio quality and design insights across 15+ brands
- 降噪卖点listing调研 (50 rows) — noise cancellation insights
- 手机类 (10 rows) — phone design insights (OPPO)
- 其他电子消费品 (42 rows) — other electronics (Marshall, Insta360, Dyson)
- 杜比&空间音效 (14 rows) — Dolby/spatial audio insights

## What to Extract

For each of the 4 brands that already have design pattern files (Apple, Beats, Bose, Shokz), extract ALL relevant copywriting insights from the Excel. The insights are in the "insight" columns (column 8 for CN insights, column 12 for US insights).

Organize the extracted insights into a single file per brand:

### Structure for each brand's insight file:

```markdown
# [Brand] — Copywriting Insights from Competitor Research

## Audio Quality Copy Patterns
- [insight 1]
- [insight 2]

## Noise Cancellation Copy Patterns
- [insight 1]

## Comfort/Fit Copy Patterns
- [insight 1]

## Design/Appearance Copy Patterns
- [insight 1]

## Data/Numbers Presentation Patterns
- [insight 1]

## Dolby/Spatial Audio Copy Patterns
- [insight 1]
```

### Also create a "Cross-Brand Copy Insights" file with:
- General copywriting best practices found across ALL brands
- Insights from non-headphone brands (Insta360, Dyson, OPPO Reno phone, Marshall) that are transferable to headphone product pages
- Common patterns in how Chinese vs US pages differ

Save these files:
1. `c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\IWE\apple-excel-insights.md`
2. `c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\IWE\beats-excel-insights.md`
3. `c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\IWE\bose-excel-insights.md`
4. `c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\IWE\cross-brand-copy-insights.md`

Note: Shokz/OpenMeet2 already has its own MSG House and FABE files, so skip Shokz-specific insights. Focus on Apple, Beats, Bose and cross-brand patterns.
</user_query>

The user wants me to extract copywriting insights from a competitor research file and organize them into separate files per brand. Let me start by reading the source file to understand its structure and content.

文件较大，我分段读取。

The file is too large to read at once. Let me read it in chunks.
The file is very large. Let me continue reading the rest of it to capture all the insights, especially for Apple, Beats, Bose, and cross-brand patterns. Let me read the remaining portions.
